headline: Max top of the pile as Sofia and Grandad cop it
text: A tidy night for Max, with Norway (Max) edging Senegal (Sofia), and that keeps Max out in front overall on 14 points. France (Carolina) gave Iraq (Sofia) a proper hiding, while Argentina (Nana) saw off Austria (Grandad), so Sofia and Grandad both took a bit of a pasting. At the top, Max is still the main boss; at the bottom, Sofia remains stuck in last on 4 points. Not exactly champagne football for the chasing pack, is it?
